trials.name: Kill the Snitch
trials.intro: Kill the Snitch is a Trial that takes place at the Police Station in The Outlast Trials. It was released on October 28th, 2022 during the closed beta launch.
objectives: Start the Generators in the Basement
Open the Execution Room Gate (Introductory difficulty)

trials.name: Cleanse the Orphans
trials.intro: Cleanse the Orphans is a Trial that takes place at the Orphanage in The Outlast Trials. It was released on May 18th, 2023 during the early access launch.
objectives: Tune Radio Receivers in the Dorms
Stop the Blasphemers in the Chapel

trials.name: Grind the Bad Apples
trials.intro: Grind the Bad Apples is a Trial that takes place at the Fun Park in The Outlast Trials. It was released on May 18th, 2023 during the early access launch.
objectives: Get access to the Root Canal Ride

trials.name: Pervert the Futterman
trials.intro: Pervert the Futterman is a Trial that takes place at the Toy Factory in The Outlast Trials. It was released March 5th, 2024 with the full launch of The Outlast Trials.

trials.name: Vindicate the Guilty
trials.intro: Vindicate the Guilty is a Trial that takes place at the Courthouse in The Outlast Trials. It was released on October 26th, 2023 as part of the first Program Geister event.
objectives: Drop the Evidence in the Fountain
Gather Acid and pour into the Fountain

trials.name: Kill the Politician
trials.intro: Kill the Politician is a Trial that takes place at the Shopping Mall in The Outlast Trials. It was released on July 15th, 2025 with the release of the Season 4: Project Diarchy, and the Kress Twins event.
objectives: Gain Access to the Main Plaza
Use the Ticket to Enter the Event

trials.name: Pleasure the Prosecutor
trials.intro: Pleasure the Prosecutor is a Trial that takes place at the Downtown in The Outlast Trials. It was released on December 10th, 2024 with the launch of Season 2: Project Breach, and the second Winter Kills event.
objectives: Find and Install the Sadist Mannequin

trials.name: Liquidate the Union
trials.intro: Liquidate the Union is a Trial that takes place at The Suburbs in The Outlast Trials. It was released on April 22nd, 2025 with the launch of Season 3: Project Relapse and the Jaeger Onboarding event.
objectives: Find the Union Boss In the Mansion
Find a way to Open the Panic Room
Escort the Union Boss to the Factory

trials.name: Silence the Idol
trials.intro: Silence the Idol is a Trial that takes place at the Television Studio in The Outlast Trials. It was released on March 24th, 2026 with the release of the Season 6: Project Judas, and the Scavenger event.
objectives: Setup the scene on the Studio floor
Find codes and use them on the switchboard

trials.name: Poison the Medicine
trials.intro: Poison the Medicine is a Trial that takes place at The Docks in The Outlast Trials. It was released on July 16th, 2024 with the launch of Season 1: Project Lupara, and the Bambino event.
objectives: Push Cart to the Train Depot for Refilling
Deliver the Cart to the Laboratory
Add Poison from the Chemical Storage
Cut and Package the Poisoned Drugs
Hide the Drugs in the Cargo Hold

trials.name: Despoil the Auction
trials.intro: Despoil the Auction is a Trial that takes place at the Resort in The Outlast Trials. It was released on December 9th, 2025 with the release of the Season 5: Project Messiah, and the third Winter Kills event.
objectives: Cover the Rest of the Balance

trials.name: Rebirth
trials.intro: thumb|Rebirth icon thumb|The form handed to the Reagents for Rebirth Rebirth, formerly known as the Reagent Release Protocol, is a game mechanic in The Outlast Trials that serves as the final step for Reagents to complete their therapy and

trials.name: Escape
trials.intro: Escape, also known as Unknown, is a temporary Trial in The Outlast Trials where Reagents are given an option to finally escape from the Sinyala Facility through the Waste Tunnel. Reagents could only access the escape trial after being promp
